verdict: A highly creative and musically accurate chart that perfectly captures the syncopated vocal chops, held back by a single physically impossible 3-panel overlap.

issues.problem: Physically impossible step: 'tap U' at 99.871 is placed while both 'HOLD L' (99.410 - 100.102) and 'HOLD D' (99.641 - 100.102) are active, requiring three feet to execute.
